creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
port www/squidtimes and www/squidclients are both not running at newer FreeBSD versions.
Since there is only a binary and no source no one can fix this, therefore I request
the ports removed from tree.

After a quick research, it seems broken since FreeBSD 5.x, also the original
website is no longer available.

last PR about squidclients (still open)
PR http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/118051 from Nov 2007
